mapper.insert: insert into fp_metric_applicability (id, tenant_id, metric_definition_id, scope_type, object_type, relation_type, source_object_type, target_object_type, collect_anchor, required_params_json, enabled, description, created_at, updated_at) values (#{id}, #{tenantId}, #{metricDefinitionId}, #{scopeType}, #{objectType}, #{relationType}, #{sourceObjectType}, #{targetObjectType}, #{collectAnchor}, #{requiredParamsJson}, #{enabled}, #{description}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.delete: delete from fp_metric_applicability where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and metric_definition_id = #{metricDefinitionId}
